outfit_info.outfit_description: This contemporary ensemble features a relaxed brown leather jacket over a striped shirt and tailored taupe trousers. Bold white and red sneakers add a playful, modern edge. The look balances classic elements with street-inspired comfort, creating a stylish and versatile aesthetic suitable for everyday wear.

model_attributes.body: The model possesses a slender, athletic build and stands with a composed, confident demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: Standing naturally with one hand casually tucked into a trouser pocket, portraying a relaxed and poised stance.
model_attributes.background: A minimalist, pristine white studio background accentuates the outfit by providing a clean, distraction-free setting.

outfit.P00980735: beige virgin wool canvas straight pants
